2289050.name: TalesOfVengeance
2289050.description:
Tales of Vengeance

Soulslike Sci-fi Action RPG

Here's a short samurai story about MasterBun, a warrior with honor and a mysterious past.

The game takes place in the "Shattered land of Time" on Planet Earth, a realm where death has been severed from the cycle of life. The sky is fractured, as if a celestial mirror was broken across the heavens, and light filters through in strange, haunting ways.

You must Travel the world to Restore Peace from all form of Invaders. You are not chosen—you are created. Forged for one purpose: to travel the lands and reignite the peace that once was.

Your mission is to explore 6 worlds to restore peace. There is  over 40 hours of gameplay.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
